meta.description: Compare leading AI API resellers like OpenRouter, AiHubMix and API2D in one place — price, speed and reliability side by side, so developers find the cheapest, fastest and most stable option.
meta.homeTitle: AI API Reseller Comparison — Find the Cheapest, Fastest, Most Reliable

home.heroTitle: Compare every AI API reseller in one place
home.heroSubtitle: Price GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini and DeepSeek across providers. Find the cheapest, fastest and most reliable one.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search a provider or model, e.g. GPT-4o, Claude, AiHubMix
home.cheapestSubtitle: Ranked by blended GPT-4o discounted price
home.editorSubtitle: Hand-picked on reliability, reputation and value
home.howTitle: Three steps to the best deal
home.howStep1Desc: Filter and sort by price, speed, uptime and payment methods.
home.howStep2Desc: Check live status, real reviews and coupon codes on the detail page.
home.howStep3Desc: Jump to the official site to buy — the transaction is handled by them.

providers.title: All AI API Resellers
providers.subtitle: {count} providers, compared on price, speed and reliability

detail.reportHint: Spot fake pricing, a scam or false info?

outbound.title: You're leaving our site
outbound.body: You're heading to a third-party site, {name}. We only aggregate and compare information — orders, payments and support are handled entirely by them. Please verify before you buy.
outbound.disclosure: We may earn an affiliate commission via this link at no extra cost to you.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.body: We use cookies for essential functionality and to understand site usage. Choose which categories to allow.

footer.affiliateText: This site contains affiliate links. When you visit a third party through our links and complete a purchase there, we may earn a commission. This does not increase your price and does not affect our objective rankings. Positions marked "Sponsored" are paid placements.
footer.aiNotice: Some content on this site is AI-assisted. Prices and information may be delayed and are for reference only, not purchase advice.

compare.title: Compare providers side by side
compare.subtitle: Pick 2-4 providers, compare price, speed and reliability line by line, and share a link
compare.needTwo: Please select at least 2 providers to compare

models.title: Model price rankings
models.subtitle: See the latest per-provider price for each model (output /1M tokens); open one for the full ranking
models.viewModel: View all quotes for this model

deals.title: Deals & coupons

rankings.title: AI API reseller rankings

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to save providers, set price alerts, post reviews and manage your data
auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.turnstileNote: This site uses Cloudflare Turnstile (not reCAPTCHA), accessible from mainland China.
auth.mockNote: Demo: credentials are stored only in your local browser, never uploaded.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loginRequired: Please log in to view your dashboard
dashboard.alertHint: Notify you when this provider's price drops (demo: stored locally)
dashboard.exportDesc: Download all your data on this site (saves, alerts, reviews, account) as JSON.
dashboard.deleteDesc: Permanently delete all your local data and log out. This cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Delete all data? This cannot be undone.

submit.phase2Note: Currently listing only; once phase-2 hosted transactions open, this becomes a formal application.
